imagery.traditionalElements: Hand emerging from cloud holding sword, crown with olive and palm branches
imagery.quantumElements: Hand offering quantum logic gate, cutting through confusion with clarity
imagery.paganElements: Sword of truth, mental clarity, decisive insight

upright.description: Mental clarity, breakthrough ideas, and truth
upright.quantumInterpretation: Quantum logic gate activation - clear computational pathways opening

reversed.quantumInterpretation: Quantum gate error - logical operations producing noise instead of clarity

imagery.traditionalElements: Blindfolded woman holding two crossed swords, moon, sea
imagery.quantumElements: Quantum system in logical balance, equal probabilities maintained, decision suspended
imagery.paganElements: Truce, stalemate, balanced opposition, blind justice
imagery.colorPalette: Balance gray, moonlight silver, sea blue

upright.quantumInterpretation: Quantum logical balance - maintaining equal superposition between options

reversed.quantumInterpretation: Logical imbalance - quantum system unable to maintain balanced states

imagery.traditionalElements: Heart pierced by three swords, rain clouds, stormy sky
imagery.quantumElements: Quantum system experiencing logical contradictions, heartbreak algorithms, painful truth realization
imagery.paganElements: Heartbreak, sorrow, painful truth, emotional storm
imagery.colorPalette: Heartbreak red, storm gray, sorrow blue

upright.quantumInterpretation: Quantum logical conflict - contradictory truths causing system distress

reversed.quantumInterpretation: Logical resolution - quantum system resolving contradictions and healing

imagery.traditionalElements: Knight resting on tomb, three swords hanging, one on tomb, stained glass
imagery.quantumElements: Quantum system in rest state, mental processes suspended for restoration, quiet contemplation
imagery.colorPalette: Rest blue, peace gray, restoration gold

upright.quantumInterpretation: Quantum system standby - computational processes paused for coherence restoration

reversed.description: Restlessness, burnout, or lack of progress
reversed.quantumInterpretation: Forced operation - quantum system denied necessary rest periods

imagery.traditionalElements: Smug figure holding three swords, two defeated figures walking away
imagery.quantumElements: Quantum system winning logical battle but creating resentment, pyrrhic victory algorithms
imagery.paganElements: Conflict, defeat, winning battles but losing war, unethical victory
imagery.colorPalette: Conflict red, victory gray, tension orange

upright.description: Conflict, defeat, and winning at all costs
upright.quantumInterpretation: Quantum logical victory - winning computational argument but damaging system relationships

reversed.quantumInterpretation: Post-conflict resolution - quantum system repairing damaged logical relationships

imagery.traditionalElements: Figure in boat with six swords, passenger, moving to calmer waters
imagery.quantumElements: Quantum system transitioning to better logical states, moving from turbulence to clarity
imagery.paganElements: Transition, journey, moving to better circumstances, rough to calm
imagery.colorPalette: Transition blue, journey gray, calm silver

upright.description: Transition, change, and moving to better circumstances
upright.quantumInterpretation: Quantum state transition - moving computational processes to more favorable conditions

reversed.description: Resistance to transition or unresolved issues
reversed.quantumInterpretation: Transition resistance - quantum system stuck in unfavorable logical states

imagery.traditionalElements: Figure stealing swords from camp, looking back suspiciously
imagery.quantumElements: Quantum system using strategic deception, information extraction, clever algorithms
imagery.colorPalette: Deception gray, strategy blue, cunning silver

upright.quantumInterpretation: Quantum strategic operations - using clever algorithms to gain advantage

reversed.quantumInterpretation: Strategic failure - quantum deception algorithms discovered and countered

imagery.traditionalElements: Blindfolded and bound woman surrounded by eight swords, water, castle
imagery.quantumElements: Quantum system trapped by logical constraints, self-imposed limitations, mental prison
imagery.colorPalette: Constraint gray, prison blue, limitation purple

upright.quantumInterpretation: Quantum logical constraints - system trapped by self-imposed computational limits

reversed.quantumInterpretation: Constraint removal - quantum system breaking free from logical limitations

imagery.traditionalElements: Figure sitting up in bed, head in hands, nine swords on wall
imagery.quantumElements: Quantum system experiencing mental overload, anxiety algorithms, worst-case scenario processing
imagery.colorPalette: Anxiety gray, torment blue, night black

upright.quantumInterpretation: Quantum mental overload - system overwhelmed by negative probability calculations

reversed.quantumInterpretation: Mental relief - quantum system resolving anxiety through positive recalibration

imagery.traditionalElements: Figure face down with ten swords in back, dark sky, sunrise
imagery.quantumElements: Quantum system reaching painful but definitive conclusion, complete logical termination, rock bottom
imagery.paganElements: Betrayal, defeat, rock bottom, painful ending
imagery.colorPalette: Defeat black, ending gray, dawn gold

reversed.description: Recovery, regeneration, or fear of ruin

imagery.traditionalElements: Youth holding sword upright, windy landscape, birds flying

reversed.quantumInterpretation: Logical immaturity - quantum initiate misusing truth-seeking algorithms

imagery.paganElements: Mental warrior, truth crusader, intellectual speed

imagery.paganElements: Clear-minded queen, honest judge, independent thinker
